page: Microsoft Azure D48s_v4 is a DSv4-family virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 35 MB of L3 cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 32 KB of L1d cache. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU. No local storage is bundled with this instance, but it is Premium Storage capable. There are no GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included.

Performance benchmarks place this server in the average tier for most operations, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1421.79 and a multi-core score of 43994.28. Memory performance is highlighted by a strong write bandwidth of 94.85 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, while read-only large block bandwidth sits at 181.84 GB/sec. In application-level benchmarks, the server achieves 41.3 million operations per second in Redis SET operations and a static web serving throughput of 29.92 GB/sec. Large language model inference performance is mixed, showing average prompt processing speeds but weak text generation speeds.

The D48s_v4 offers a balanced resource density suitable for general-purpose enterprise workloads. The lack of local storage requires external disk attachment, which may impact I/O-intensive tasks unless Premium Storage is utilized. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it cost-efficient for workloads requiring substantial memory without needing specialized memory-optimized pricing tiers. It is well-suited for database operations, software compilation, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: The Microsoft Azure D48s_v4 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DSv4 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 48 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of RAM. Operating on Microsoft Hyper-V, this x86_64 server delivers balanced performance across standard benchmarks, including a multi-core stress-ng score of 43994.28 and a strong large-block memory write bandwidth of 94.85 GB/sec. While it lacks local storage, it is Premium Storage capable and supports external disk attachments. This configuration is highly suitable for general-purpose enterprise applications, database hosting, and software compilation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D48s_v4 is a DSv4-family virtual machine featuring 48 vCPUs, 192 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor, delivering balanced performance for general-purpose enterprise workloads.

tagline: A balanced 48-vCPU virtual machine with 192 GB RAM, offering strong memory write bandwidth for general-purpose enterprise workloads.

192.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per vCPU ratio
Premium Storage capable with no bundled local storage
